Eres una empresa o startup?
Publica tus ofertas y accede al talento digital mas activo de Lisboa, Barcelona y Milan. Verificado por la comunidad.
Premio: Beca Le Wagon

DMK Tribe × Le Wagon

Primera edicion · Lisboa, Barcelona, Milan

Disena la estrategia de marketing digital con IA para posicionar a Le Wagon en el mercado de upskilling en Europa del Sur.

El reto en 3 pasos

1
Forma tu equipo
La plataforma te sugiere companeros segun tus skills complementarias
2
Resuelve el reto (4 semanas)
Entrega una estrategia real que Le Wagon puede implementar
3
Gana la beca
El mejor equipo recibe una beca Le Wagon valorada en 3.000–8.000 EUR

Monthly badge income
+50 pts/month
Speaker Talk or workshop given +15
OG Member Loyalty since the beginning +25
Add more badges to increase your monthly income Max: +105/mo
Activity decay
Protected by badges
Last verified action Today · check-in
Activity window 28 days remaining
Your 2 active badges protect 40 pts from decay this month
If no verified action in 30 days: −10% of balance
Decay never drops you below your current level minimum
Badge income always applies before decay is calculated
Each active badge protects 20 pts from decay per month
Credits measure your real contribution
Sending 50 connection requests at once does not earn points — it deducts them. The system detects spam patterns and penalizes. Credits are earned by genuinely contributing: attending events, publishing projects, giving feedback, referring people who add value.
How to earn credits
Real presence · no spam
Attend an in-person event
Verified check-in at the event. Credit is granted on exit, not on registration.
+50
Give a workshop or talk
You share knowledge with the community. Max 2 times per month to avoid inflation.
+60
Refer a member who becomes active
Only counts if the referred person completes their profile and makes at least one interaction in 30 days.
+40
Publish a real project
With brief, budget and deadline. Incomplete or vague projects do not score.
+20
Complete your profile 100%
Photo, bio, skills, city, what you are looking for. One time only.
+30
Connection accepted by the other person
Not for sending it — only if the other accepts. Incentivises meaningful connections.
+5 per acceptance
Give useful feedback to a workshop
Feedback of at least 3 lines. The system filters generic responses.
+10
Vote in an active poll
Small contribution, small reward. Maximum 3 polls per day.
+3
Cost of actions
Interact with intention
Send a connection request
If you send more than 10 per day, the cost rises to −15 per request. Automatic anti-spam.
−5
Apply to a project
Ensures applications are serious. You recover −10 if the project hires you.
−10
Propose a virtual coffee
Low cost to encourage real conversations. Limit of 5 proposals per day.
−3
Direct message
Only to accepted connections. Messages not replied in 7 days return the credit.
−2
Automatic penalties
Mass requests not accepted: −15 per request from the 10th of the day
Profile reported for spam: −50 immediately + admin review
Systematically ignored messages: −5 per week of inactivity in open chats
Projects published without responding to applications: −20 after 30 days
